/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/webgpu_verifier.dir/src/webgpu_verifier.cpp.o -o webgpu_verifier  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib liblog.a libbn254.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_random.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_log.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_serialization.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_program_options.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib/libgmpxx.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.2/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib /usr/local/lib/libwabt.a /usr/local/lib/libwebgpu_dawn.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_filesystem.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_regex.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_thread.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_atomic.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_chrono.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_date_time.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/gmp/6.3.0/lib/libgmp.dylib /opt/homebrew/Cellar/openssl@3/3.5.2/lib/libcrypto.dylib
